hero.headline: Protect Your Home with a Roof Built to Last
hero.subheadline: From minor repairs to full replacements, we deliver premium workmanship and peace of mind.

featureSections.title: Premium Roofing That Stands Up to Texas Weather
featureSections.body: We use only industry-leading materials designed to withstand hail, wind, and scorching heat. Your roof will look beautiful and last for decades.
featureSections.cardBody: Our experts inspect your roof and provide a detailed, no-obligation quote.

featureSections.title: Meticulous Installation by Certified Pros
featureSections.body: Every project is led by experienced, factory-trained installers who follow strict quality protocols. We don’t cut corners — your safety is our priority.
featureSections.cardBody: Full liability and workers’ comp coverage for your complete protection.

home.whyTitle: Why Dallas Homeowners Choose Myriad Roofing

whyChooseUs.title: Local Expertise
whyChooseUs.description: We know Dallas weather and building codes inside out. Your roof is designed for this climate.

whyChooseUs.title: Transparent Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: No hidden fees, no surprise charges. You’ll know the cost upfront with a clear, written estimate.

whyChooseUs.title: Quality Guarantee
whyChooseUs.description: We stand behind every roof with a comprehensive workmanship warranty. If something’s not right, we fix it.

whyChooseUs.title: Hassle-Free Process
whyChooseUs.description: From initial inspection to final cleanup, we handle everything so you can relax.

testimonials.quote: Myriad replaced my entire roof after a storm. The team was professional, on time, and cleaned up every nail. Highly recommend!

testimonials.quote: I’ve used Myriad for both repair and replacement. Their communication is excellent and the quality is top-notch.
testimonials.author: Linda M.

testimonials.quote: They helped me navigate insurance claims and made the whole process stress-free. My new roof looks amazing.

cta.headline: Ready for a Roof You Can Rely On?
cta.subheadline: Schedule your free estimate today and join hundreds of satisfied Dallas homeowners.

servicesPage.intro: From emergency repairs to complete roof replacements, Myriad Roofing delivers expert solutions tailored to your home and budget. Every service includes a thorough inspection, premium materials, and a workmanship guarantee.

services.title: Residential Roof Replacement
services.shortDescription: Full roof replacements using top-tier shingles and materials built for Texas weather.
services.longDescription: When your roof has reached the end of its life, we provide a seamless replacement process. We remove the old roof, inspect the decking, install new underlayment and flashing, and finish with your choice of architectural or premium shingles. The result is a beautiful, durable roof that adds value and curb appeal to your home.
benefits: Enhanced energy efficiency with proper ventilation
Comprehensive warranty on materials and labor

process.title: Inspection & Estimate
process.description: We inspect your roof, measure, and provide a detailed quote with no surprises.

process.title: Material Selection
process.description: Choose from GAF, CertainTeed, and other top brands with our guidance.

process.title: Installation & Cleanup
process.description: Our crew installs your new roof efficiently and leaves your property spotless.

faqs.question: How long does a roof replacement take?
faqs.answer: Most residential replacements are completed in 1–3 days, depending on size and complexity.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during the work?
faqs.answer: Not necessarily. We’ll coordinate with you and keep you updated throughout the process.

services.title: Roof Repairs & Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Fast, reliable repairs for leaks, missing shingles, and storm damage.
services.longDescription: Whether it’s a small leak or damage from a recent storm, our repair team responds quickly to prevent further issues. We diagnose the root cause, use matching materials, and ensure the repair blends seamlessly with your existing roof. Regular maintenance plans also help extend your roof’s lifespan.

process.title: Diagnostic Inspection
process.description: We locate the source of the problem and assess any underlying damage.

process.title: Repair Plan
process.description: We explain the needed repairs and provide a fixed price before starting.

process.title: Quality Repair
process.description: Our technicians complete the repair with precision and test for water tightness.

faqs.question: Can you match my existing shingles?
faqs.answer: Yes, we source shingles from the same manufacturer to ensure a near-perfect match.

faqs.question: Do you offer emergency repairs?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Call us anytime for urgent leak or storm damage repairs.

services.title: Storm Damage Restoration
services.shortDescription: Expert help with hail, wind, and storm damage – including insurance claims assistance.
services.longDescription: Dallas storms can be brutal. Our team specializes in assessing and repairing storm damage quickly. We work with your insurance company, provide detailed documentation, and fight to get you the coverage you deserve. From tarping to full restoration, we handle the entire process so you can focus on recovery.

process.title: Damage Assessment
process.description: We inspect for hail hits, wind lift, and hidden damage, then document everything.

process.title: Insurance Liaison
process.description: We help file your claim, meet the adjuster, and ensure all damage is covered.

process.title: Restoration & Repair
process.description: Once approved, we complete the repairs or replacement to pre-storm condition.

faqs.question: Will my insurance cover the full cost?
faqs.answer: Most policies cover storm damage minus your deductible. We’ll help you maximize your claim.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond after a storm?
faqs.answer: We prioritize storm calls and usually inspect within 24 hours.

services.title: Gutter Installation & Repair
services.shortDescription: Seamless gutters and downspouts to protect your roof and foundation.
services.longDescription: Proper gutters are essential for directing water away from your roof and foundation. We install seamless aluminum gutters in a variety of colors to match your home. Our team also repairs leaks, sagging sections, and downspout issues to keep your drainage system working efficiently.
benefits: Prevents water damage to fascia and foundation
Leaf guards available for low maintenance

process.title: Free Consultation
process.description: We measure your roofline and discuss gutter style, color, and accessories.

process.title: Fabrication & Installation
process.description: Gutters are custom-made on-site for a perfect fit and seamless appearance.

process.title: Final Inspection
process.description: We test water flow and ensure downspouts are properly positioned.

faqs.question: How often should gutters be cleaned?
faqs.answer: At least twice a year, or more if you have overhanging trees.

faqs.question: Do you install gutter guards?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer leaf guards that reduce cleaning frequency and prevent clogs.

about.headline: Built on Quality, Driven by Integrity
about.mission: To provide Dallas homeowners with roofing solutions that combine exceptional craftsmanship, premium materials, and honest service – ensuring every roof we touch adds lasting value and peace of mind.
story: Myriad Roofing & Construction was founded on a simple belief: that every homeowner deserves a roof they can trust. Our founder, a Dallas native with over 15 years in the construction industry, saw too many families left with leaky roofs and empty promises. Determined to change that, he built Myriad around transparency, quality, and local pride.

Today, we’ve completed over 1,200 roofs across the Dallas metro area, earning a reputation for reliability and meticulous work. Our team of certified installers undergoes continuous training to stay ahead of the latest techniques and safety standards. We’re not just a roofing company – we’re your neighbors, committed to protecting what matters most.

coreValues.title: Craftsmanship
coreValues.description: We take pride in every nail, every seam, and every detail. Quality is non-negotiable.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: Honest assessments, transparent pricing, and keeping our word – always.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We’re local, and we give back. Supporting Dallas neighborhoods is part of our mission.

coreValues.title: Safety
coreValues.description: Rigorous safety protocols protect our crew and your property on every job.

contact.headline: Let’s Talk About Your Roof
contact.subheadline: Get a free, no-obligation estimate from Dallas’s trusted roofing experts.
